title: verbascum glanduliferum
intro: Verbascum glanduliferum, also known as Woolly Mullein, is a biennial plant species within the figwort family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Woolly Mullein include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Woolly Mullein include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
